title: Wonder Man
description: The cult classic 1980s film gets a modern reboot. Wonder Man, with his sidekick Barnaby, uses his powerful ionic energy to fight evil where he least expects it.
quote: I’m never gonna give up. I don’t care about the cost.
altHero: Wonder Man, a black superhero with red-tinted glasses
alt1: Wonder Man stands in front a window
alt3: Barnaby smiles while he holds a weapon to his chest
alt4: wide shot of a pool and Wonder Man stands at the far end
